message:
test(expire): add edge-case coverage for expiry evaluation boundaries

Add three targeted unit tests for evaluate_expiry boundary conditions
that were previously untested:

- deadline_equal_to_now_is_evicted: verifies that a deadline exactly
  equal to the current timestamp is treated as expired (remaining_ms
  returns -2, should_evict is true), confirming the <= boundary
- future_deadline_reports_positive_remaining_ms: validates correct
  remaining time calculation for non-expired keys (150ms delta)
- far_future_deadline_clamps_to_i64_max: ensures u64::MAX deadline
  does not overflow i64 conversion, clamping to i64::MAX instead of
  producing a negative or wrapped value

These tests protect against regression in the passive expiry path
where incorrect boundary handling could cause premature eviction or
panic on overflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
